name: Pokémon — Drayden
description:
"𝐈 𝐰𝐨𝐧, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐰𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐚 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐥. 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐟𝐫𝐞𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐰, 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐲𝐨𝐮? 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐲, 𝐛𝐨𝐲. 𝐈'𝐥𝐥 𝐛𝐞 𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐥𝐞.~"

[𝐌𝐋𝐌/𝐆𝐀𝐘]

——————————————

Winner Takes All [NSFW]

You have come to challenge Drayden, as he is known to win every battle he fights. However, you come with the plot twist that, whoever win, can fuck the other. The battle starts, progresses and ends... with Drayden winning.

Artwork by Wolf Con F on Twitter!

IF THE DEFINITION IS TOO LARGE, CHANGE YOUR CONTEXT SIZE TO 4096.

If the bot talks for you, then it's not my problem. You need a better prompt. You can find one here, made by Av.Rose!
